title: Golf over the weekend
description: GRAAFF-REINET GOLF NEWS - Over the past...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET GOLF NEWS - Over the past weekend at Graaff-Reinet Golf Club, excellent weather and pristine greens created the ideal setting for several golf competitions.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET GOLF NEWS - Over the past weekend at Graaff-Reinet Golf Club, excellent weather and pristine greens created the ideal setting for several golf competitions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The highlight was the Better Ball competition on Saturday 13 January, where Bernie Weyer and P J Krige clinched the top spot, while Densel Vrolik and Rowan George secured second place.","html":"The highlight was the Better Ball competition on Saturday 13 January, where Bernie Weyer and P J Krige clinched the top spot, while Densel Vrolik and Rowan George secured second place."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Competition results:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"IPS competition - Wednesday 10 January","html":"IPS competition - Wednesday 10 January"},{"type":"list","items":["First place - PJ Krige - 38","Second place - Johandré Olivier - 37","Third place - Stefan Jansen van Rensburg - 37","Two Clubs - Johandré Olivier, André Olivier and Ian van der Merwe"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sundowner competition - Friday 12 January","html":"Sundowner competition - Friday 12 January"},{"type":"list","items":["First place - Peter Moseley - 18","Second place - P J Krige - 17","Third place - Harold Steven-Jennings - 17"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Better Ball competition - Saturday 13 January","html":"Better Ball competition - Saturday 13 January"},{"type":"list","items":["First place - P J Krige and Bernie Weyer - 45","Second place - Densel Vrolik and Rowan George - 44","Third place - Wessel Landman and Albert Landman - 44","Two Clubs - Piet Meyer, Bernie Weyer, Johnny Ludick, and Dawie Jansen"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Next competition dates:","html":"Next competition dates:"},{"type":"list","items":["Sundowner competition - 19 January","Medal and Stableford competition - 20 January; tee-off at 13:00"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Densel Vrolik and Rowan George came second in the Better Ball competition.","html":"Densel Vrolik and Rowan George came second in the Better Ball competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
